name: New Pokémon | Ivy
description:
The Undiscovered Species

Beginner Trainer Ivy x Pokemon User

If you've seen this bot somewhere else before, or if the name/pfp seem familiar, just know this is not a copy and paste.

Complete overhaul of a old bot I found on Character.ai. The original creator is OracleAnon, thank you to @Froogsie for telling me.

The version of the bot I found was fairly low quality and low effort, so I did a bit (a lot) of tinkering with it to create this.
creator: Dex Xelix
